name: Grilled Potato & Onion Packages
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons fresh thyme (or 1 Tbsp dried), chopped
2 lbs. white skinned potatoes, peeled and sliced 1/4 inch thick
2 large red onions, halved and sliced 1/2 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine oil, mustard, thyme, salt, and pepper in a large bowl. Whisk to blend well.
- Can be prepared up to 6 hours ahead. Cover and let stand at room temperature.
2. Prepare the barbecue on medium-high heat.
3. Add potatoes and onions to the mustard-oil mixture. Toss to coat evenly.
4. Place one long sheet of heavy-duty aluminum foil (or two sheets of regular foil) on a work surface.
5. Spray the foil with PAM.
6. Lay vegetables in the center of the foil.
7. Pour remaining oil over the vegetables.
8. Cover with more foil, rolling up each end and then sealing both ends tightly.
9. Place the package on the grill.
10. Cook for approximately 25 minutes.
11. Remove from the grill, slit the package top, fold back, and garnish with fresh thyme sprigs.
